title: Module 3 — RAG Pipeline
subtitle: Source → load → chunk → embed → index → retrieve → query → answer

nodes.label: Source
nodes.definition: Where knowledge lives before LlamaIndex — files, APIs, DB, web.
nodes.whyItMatters: RAG starts outside the framework; you must pick sources first.
nodes.safeSentence: Source is raw knowledge; it is not yet a Document.
nodes.commonTrap: Treating a file path as if it were already a LlamaIndex object.
nodes.interviewAnswer: I separate source (external data) from Document (in-memory loaded unit).

nodes.label: Loader
nodes.definition: Code that reads a source and returns list[Document].
nodes.whyItMatters: Bridge from disk/API to LlamaIndex types.
nodes.interviewAnswer: Loaders materialize sources into Document objects with text and metadata.

note.summary:
documents = SimpleDirectoryReader(str(DATA_DIR)).load_data()

Each doc has .text and .metadata (file_name, file_path, etc.).

nodes.label: Documents
nodes.definition: LlamaIndex Document — whole loaded unit with text and metadata.
nodes.whyItMatters: Splitters and indexes work from Documents or nodes derived from them.
nodes.safeSentence: Document(text=..., metadata={...}) is one source unit before chunking.

nodes.label: Nodes / Chunks
nodes.definition: Smaller pieces after SentenceSplitter — sized for retrieval.
nodes.whyItMatters: chunk_size is in tokens; three sentences ≠ three nodes automatically.
nodes.safeSentence: SentenceSplitter turns Documents into nodes under a token budget.
nodes.commonTrap: Assuming each paragraph becomes exactly one node.

nodes.label: Embeddings
nodes.definition: Numeric vectors representing text meaning for similarity search.
nodes.whyItMatters: Retriever compares question embeddings to chunk embeddings.

nodes.label: Index / Vector Store
nodes.definition: VectorStoreIndex embeds nodes and stores vectors for lookup.
nodes.whyItMatters: One LlamaIndex step vs LangChain embed-then-Chroma separately.
nodes.safeSentence: VectorStoreIndex(nodes) embeds and stores in one call.

nodes.label: Retriever
nodes.definition: as_retriever().retrieve(q) — top-k chunks, no LLM answer.
nodes.whyItMatters: Separates search from generation; uses embeddings only.
nodes.safeSentence: Retriever returns ranked chunks and scores, not prose answers.
nodes.commonTrap: Expecting similarity_top_k results when the index has fewer nodes.

nodes.label: Query Engine
nodes.whyItMatters: One-call RAG answer like LangChain RetrievalQA.
nodes.safeSentence: Query engine adds the LLM on top of retrieval.

nodes.label: GenAI Model / LLM
nodes.definition: LLM reads {context_str} from prompt template and generates text.
nodes.whyItMatters: Course uses watsonx; local labs use OpenAI via Settings.llm.
nodes.safeSentence: Settings.llm = OpenAI(...) replaces WatsonxLLM in local practice.

nodes.label: Answer
nodes.definition: Final response string returned from query().
nodes.whyItMatters: Grounded when retrieval + templates constrain the LLM.
nodes.safeSentence: str(response) is what the user sees.

paths.label: Ingest Lane
paths.description: Phase 1 focus — source through loader (study maps built).

paths.label: Query Lane
paths.description: Index through answer — upgrade scaffolds as you study.
